source: Geospatial pipeline 07_resource_potential.py Tier 2 'pome' — SRR + competing-use-fraction deducted per config.RESIDUE_RATIOS/WASTE_PARAMS
note: POME OIL (recovered triglyceride, ready for biodiesel) — NOT raw POME effluent. Canonical basis per Bioenergy/Analysis/unit_conversion_anchors.md §3 + config.RESIDUE_RATIOS['pome'] note (LHV 36.5 GJ/t; LEAP Fuel-side basis). Author-side cost $225/t POME oil 2025 (collection + dewatering + triglyceride extraction + transport per Pavlenko 2019 ICCT HEFA $200-300/t mid; Loh 2013; Hayyan 2010) converted to LEAP-side TOE basis via × 0.8718 (POME-oil LHV 36.5 / TOE 41.868 — canonical guide §12.1 author-action 2026-04-29; the LEAP team's handoff used 0.86 with placeholder LHV 36 GJ/t — we use 0.8718 with the more authoritative LHV 36.5 from unit_conversion_anchors.md §3). Consumed by POME Biodiesel.
